whatsnew: Live Sessions: blocking-chain lines now render correctly with arrowheads and a blocking banner
Live Sessions: blocking lines moved to MarkupString path with InvariantCulture coords — fixes locale-specific rendering failure
Alerting: ag_listener_offline query fixed — bad listener_id join replaced with ip_address+port join via availability_group_listener_ip_addresses
Alert definitions: all 80 alerts now carry uniform schema (alwaysAlert, primaryChannel, escalation fields, etc.)
Alert edit modal: channel dropdowns populated from enabled channels; alwaysAlert/sendEmail/escalate always visible
Alert Templates tab: per-channel template editors with token reference, Reset to Default, full HTML email support
AutoUpdate: version comparison now handles GitHub tag format v0.85.2-build1046 correctly
Query Plan: stored procedure plans (StmtCond WHILE/IF) now parse correctly — condition plan shown, body statements as separate tabs
Query Plan: null-safety fix for fallback parent-selection path in ParseAll
Alerting: xp_readerrorlog datetime params pre-declared as variables — fixes 'Incorrect syntax near MINUTE' on every poll cycle
Alerting: deadlock count fast-path — NVARCHAR LIKE pre-check skips full XML cast when no deadlocks in ring buffer; timeout raised to 30s
